categories.description: Failures caused by inefficient database queries, missing indexes, or resource exhaustion

failure_modes.failure_mode_name: Missing Index on Batch Job Query
failure_modes.description: Batch job performs full table scan due to missing composite index, causing long-running query that exhausts connection pool

detection_methods.signal: Full table scan detected in query execution plan
Connection pool utilization >90% with waiting connections

prevention_controls.control_name: Mandatory Index Review for Batch Jobs
prevention_controls.description: Require database index analysis and approval before deploying any batch job to production
prevention_controls.implementation: Pre-production gate requiring DBA review of query execution plans against production-scale data

prevention_controls.description: Enforce maximum query execution time limits for all batch jobs
prevention_controls.implementation: Set statement_timeout=300s for batch jobs, 30s for real-time queries

prevention_controls.description: Schedule resource-intensive batch jobs during off-peak hours only
prevention_controls.implementation: Policy: batch jobs run 00:00-06:00 UTC only, with exceptions requiring VP approval

prevention_controls.description: Separate connection pools and resource quotas for batch vs real-time workloads
prevention_controls.implementation: Dedicated connection pool for batch jobs (max 20 connections), separate from real-time pool (80 connections)

prevention_controls.description: Continuous monitoring of query patterns with automated index recommendations
prevention_controls.implementation: Weekly automated analysis of slow queries with missing index suggestions sent to DBA team

failure_modes.description: Long-running queries consume all available database connections, blocking new requests

detection_methods.signal: Active connections >= pool_size with waiting queue >0

prevention_controls.description: Size connection pools based on workload analysis with headroom for spikes
prevention_controls.implementation: Increase pool size to 150 with dynamic scaling based on load

prevention_controls.description: Enforce maximum connection hold time to prevent connection leaks

categories.description: Failures caused by improper scheduling, resource allocation, or isolation of different workload types

failure_modes.description: Batch processing jobs compete with real-time customer traffic for shared resources

detection_methods.signal: Database CPU >80% during batch job execution
Real-time service latency spikes correlate with batch job start times

prevention_controls.description: Enforce resource limits (CPU, memory, I/O) for batch workloads
prevention_controls.implementation: Kubernetes resource limits for batch pods, database resource governor for batch queries

prevention_controls.description: Run batch workloads on separate database replicas or compute resources
prevention_controls.implementation: Route batch queries to read replica, use separate compute cluster for batch processing

categories.description: Failures in circuit breakers, timeouts, and other resilience mechanisms

failure_modes.description: Database issues trigger circuit breakers across multiple dependent services, causing widespread outage

prevention_controls.description: Isolate critical services to prevent cascading failures
prevention_controls.implementation: Separate connection pools per service, independent circuit breakers with different thresholds

prevention_controls.description: Services continue operating with reduced functionality when dependencies fail
prevention_controls.implementation: Implement fallback mechanisms, cached data serving, read-only modes

categories.description: Failures caused by inadequate processes, governance, or learning from incidents

failure_modes.description: Same root cause causes multiple incidents due to inadequate systemic remediation

detection_methods.signal: Same root_cause_category appears in multiple incidents within 90 days
Action items from previous incidents not completed before recurrence

prevention_controls.description: For any incident with similar historical incidents, require systemic remediation plan before closure
prevention_controls.implementation: Incident review board must approve systemic controls for recurring patterns, track to completion

prevention_controls.description: Require performance testing with production-scale data before deploying batch jobs
prevention_controls.implementation: Staging environment with production data volumes, automated performance regression tests

prevention_controls.description: Formal review and approval process for all database schema changes and new queries
prevention_controls.implementation: DBA review required for all schema changes, query performance analysis in CI/CD pipeline

failure_modes.description: Early warning signals present but not monitored or acted upon before critical failure

detection_methods.signal: Post-incident review identifies observable signals without corresponding alerts

prevention_controls.description: Alert on query execution plans showing full table scans or inefficient patterns
prevention_controls.implementation: Real-time query plan analysis with alerts for full table scans on tables >100k rows

prevention_controls.description: Alert on early warning signals before critical thresholds reached
prevention_controls.implementation: Alert at 70% connection pool utilization, query duration >10s, latency P95 >2x baseline

cross_cutting_recommendations.title: Comprehensive Database Performance Framework
cross_cutting_recommendations.description: Implement end-to-end database performance management including index governance, query review, timeout enforcement, and workload isolation

cross_cutting_recommendations.title: Batch Job Deployment Standards
cross_cutting_recommendations.description: Establish mandatory standards for batch job deployment including performance testing, off-peak scheduling, resource limits, and timeout configuration

cross_cutting_recommendations.title: Systemic Learning and Remediation Process
cross_cutting_recommendations.description: Implement process to identify recurring patterns and require systemic remediation before incident closure

cross_cutting_recommendations.title: Workload Isolation Architecture
cross_cutting_recommendations.description: Separate batch and real-time workloads at infrastructure level with dedicated resources and connection pools
